commands.title: Chisel Reverse Port Forwarding (Server - Attacker)
commands.description: Start a Chisel server in reverse mode on the attacker's machine to allow incoming client connections.

commands.title: Chisel Reverse Port Forwarding (Client - Victim)
commands.description: Connect from the victim machine to the attacker's server and expose a remote port to the attacker's machine.

commands.title: Metasploit Port Forwarding - Add
commands.description: Forward a local port to a remote address and port using Metasploit’s portfwd command.

commands.title: Metasploit Port Forwarding - List
commands.description: List all current port forwards in Metasploit.

commands.title: Metasploit Port Forwarding - Delete
commands.description: Remove a previously set port forward in Metasploit.

commands.title: SSH Local Port Forwarding
commands.description: Forward a port from the local machine to a remote machine using SSH.

commands.title: SSH Remote Port Forwarding
commands.description: Expose a port on the remote machine that forwards to a local address and port.
